PowerShell($logs = "c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Sero\\darren\\logs"; $shortToLong = @{ Jan='january'; Feb='february'; Mar='march'; Apr='april'; May='may'; Jun='june'; Jul='july'; Aug='august'; Sep='september'; Oct='october'; Nov='november'; Dec='december' }; $moved = 0; foreach \($entry in Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $logs -Directory\) { if \($entry.Name -match '^\\d{4}_\([A-Z][a-z]{2}\)\\d{2}_'\) { $short = $matches[1]; $long = $shortToLong[$short]; if \(-not $long\) { continue }; $dest = Join-Path $logs $long; if \(-not \(Test-Path -LiteralPath $dest\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest | Out-Null }; Move-Item -LiteralPath $entry.FullName -Destination $dest; $moved++ } }; Write-Output "moved $moved session dirs")

Bash(node -e "const {listRecentRuns, summarizeRun} = require\('./src/run-history'\); const r = listRecentRuns\(3\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); if \(r[0]\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(summarizeRun\(r[0].id\), null, 2\)\);")
